items.prompt: Editorial photography for a premium Japanese luxury label, considered and quietly confident. a single curated essential — a folded heavyweight garment, the chef's selection — a hero composition for the storefront, the single confident piece. resting on warm sandstone. soft warm daylight, gentle directional shadow, calm and unhurried. muted sand, clay, and sumi palette — warm neutrals, terracotta accent, deep warm near-black. calm and considered, generous negative space (ma), restraint, nothing extra; wide, unhurried storefront opener; one confident piece carrying the whole frame. shot on medium format, shallow controlled depth of field, magazine-quality, no text, no logos, no robots, no sci-fi
